generated_oml:
instance ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external room temperature (-55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorInternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside incubator box (first sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorInternal1TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorInternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer inside incubator box (second sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorInternal2TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance IncubatorInternal1TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorInternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance IncubatorInternal2TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorInternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance TemperatureMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalRoomTemperatureDataTransmitted, IncubatorInternal1TemperatureDataTransmitted, IncubatorInternal2TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, RabbitMQMessageBroker, RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler
]

instance SimplifiedEnergyFlowModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simplified dynamic energy-flow model with 2 parameters: C_air (air heat capacity) and G_box (box thermal conductance)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler
]

instance DetailedEnergyFlowModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed dynamic energy-flow model with 4 parameters: C_heater (heater heat capacity), C_air (air heat capacity), G_heater (heater thermal conductance), G_box (box thermal conductance)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for 4A current handling"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for air circulation (0.02 m³/s airflow) actuated through Raspberry Pi GPIO"
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical components and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, MonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService, ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization of model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hosting low-level driver and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, MonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService, ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance PCBDesignEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe current control of heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code and hardware specifications enabling replication and iterative improvement"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for thermal incubator system"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for heatbed and fan control"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, sensors, controller, and PCB"
    base:contains ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor, IncubatorInternalTemperatureSensor1, IncubatorInternalTemperatureSensor2, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4ModelBComponent, PCBComponent
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A (2 parameters) and Model B (4 parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionResultInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter estimation via non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResultsInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring for safety violations and suboptimal performance in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, SuboptimalPerformanceInsight, PhysicalAdjustmentAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation services for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationResultInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection services for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control parameters for bang-bang controller (upper/lower temperature limits and timing parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedControlParametersInsight, PhysicalAdjustmentAction
]

instance CalibrationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibration results used to update model parameters for improved prediction accuracy"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in thermal incubator system (e.g., temperature exceeding safe limits)"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected suboptimal performance in thermal incubator system (e.g., temperature fluctuations beyond thresholds)"
]

instance OptimizedControlParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for bang-bang controller (e.g., updated upper/lower temperature limits and timing)"
]

instance StateEstimationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of thermal incubator system components"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in thermal incubator system components (e.g., sensor failure or actuator malfunction)"
]

instance PredictionResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models for thermal incubator system"
]

instance PhysicalAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustments to physical system (e.g., changing heatbed power or fan speed) based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) through RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates messages into GPIO signals for MOSFET control of heatbed and fan operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system comprising physical incubator components (heatbed, fan, sensors), RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi, controller logic, low-level driver, and dual simulation models (Model A/B), with data flow via RabbitMQ between physical and virtual components as shown in Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, where the digital twin integrates with the deployed physical incubator system for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization after initial deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through experimental comparison of model predictions with real-world data; testing of assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature via multi-sensor experiments, energy transfer models), with residual error minimization during calibration to ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker (AMQP protocol) running on Raspberry Pi for communication between physical components (sensors, actuators) and digital twin modules, with data transmitted via message queues for synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller logic, and low-level driver all hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with all software components deployed on-premises for local control and communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety during actuation, though specific cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, access control) are not detailed in the document."
]
